holdings.infoBox: NPFE is an equity ETF with a total of 401 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 8.70%, Alphabet at 5.76%, Applied Materials at 5.11%, Ball Corporation at 4.30%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.01%.

overview.description: The NPF Core Equity ETF (NPFE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests primarily in US equities selected through fundamental research. The portfolio emphasizes companies with strong financial characteristics and long-term growth potential. NPFE was launched on Mar 11, 2026 and is issued by NPF.
